official_functions.role: Construct the official singleton Configuration serverbound accept_code_of_conduct packet
Write the official Configuration serverbound accept_code_of_conduct body
Write the full Configuration serverbound framed accept_code_of_conduct packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration serverbound framed accept_code_of_conduct packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration serverbound state
Read the decoded singleton packet identity from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the accept_code_of_conduct body.
The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundAcceptCodeOfConductPacket.
The decoded official ServerboundAcceptCodeOfConductPacket preserves the singleton packet identity produced by the official fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded singleton equality result, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove UI consent flow, legal acceptance semantics, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer UI consent flow, legal acceptance semantics, Configuration-to-Play readiness, or Play readiness.
